verses.latin_vulgate: Et tu assume planctum super principes Israël,
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover take thou up a lamentation for the princes of Israel,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta tee sinä valitusitku Israelin päämiehistä.
verses.king_james: Moreover take thou up a lamentation for the princes of Israel,

verses.latin_vulgate: et dices :   Quare mater tua leæna inter leones cubavit ?  in medio leunculorum enutrivit catulos suos ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָמַרְתָּ֗ מָ֤ה אִמְּךָ֙ לְבִיָּ֔א בֵּ֥ין אֲרָי֖וֹת רָבָ֑צָה בְּת֥וֹךְ כְּפִרִ֖ים רִבְּתָ֥ה גוּרֶֽיהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And say: Why did thy mother the lioness lie down among the lions, and bring up her whelps in the midst of young lions?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sano: miksi sinun äitis naaras jalopeura makasi jalopeurain seassa, ja kasvatti penikkansa nuorten jalopeurain seassa.
verses.king_james: And say, What is thy mother? A lioness: she lay down among lions, she nourished her whelps among young lions.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et eduxit unum de leunculis suis,  et leo factus est :  et didicit capere prædam,  hominemque comedere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתַּ֛עַל אֶחָ֥ד מִגֻּרֶ֖יהָ כְּפִ֣יר הָיָ֑ה וַיִּלְמַ֥ד לִטְרׇף־טֶ֖רֶף אָדָ֥ם אָכָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she brought out one of her whelps, and he became a lion: and he learned to catch the prey, and to devour men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Yhden hän niistä kasvatti, ja siitä tuli nuori jalopeura, se tottui julmasti repimään ja syömään ihmisiä.
verses.king_james: And she brought up one of her whelps: it became a young lion, and it learned to catch the prey; it devoured men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et audierunt de eo gentes :  et non absque vulneribus suis ceperunt eum,  et adduxerunt eum in catenis in terram Ægypti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁמְע֥וּ אֵלָ֛יו גּוֹיִ֖ם בְּשַׁחְתָּ֣ם נִתְפָּ֑שׂ וַיְבִאֻ֥הוּ בַחַחִ֖ים אֶל־אֶ֥רֶץ מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the nations heard of him, and took him, but not without receiving wounds: and they brought him in chains into the land of Egypt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin pakanat sen hänestä kuulivat, ottivat he sen kiinni luolassansa, ja veivät sen kahleissa Egyptin maalle.
verses.king_james: The nations also heard of him; he was taken in their pit, and they brought him with chains unto the land of Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quæ cum vidisset quoniam infirmata est,  et periit exspectatio ejus,  tulit unum de leunculis suis ;  leonem constituit eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֵּ֙רֶא֙ כִּ֣י נֽוֹחֲלָ֔ה אָבְדָ֖ה תִּקְוָתָ֑הּ וַתִּקַּ֛ח אֶחָ֥ד מִגֻּרֶ֖יהָ כְּפִ֥יר שָׂמָֽתְהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But she seeing herself weakened, and that her hope was lost, took one of her young lions, and set him up for a lion.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin nyt äiti sen näki, että hänen toivonsa oli pois, otti hän toisen pojistansa ja teki siitä nuoren jalopeuran.
verses.king_james: Now when she saw that she had waited, and her hope was lost, then she took another of her whelps, and made him a young lion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui incedebat inter leones,  et factus est leo :  et didicit prædam capere,  et homines devorare :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְהַלֵּ֥ךְ בְּתוֹךְ־אֲרָי֖וֹת כְּפִ֣יר הָיָ֑ה וַיִּלְמַ֥ד לִטְרׇף־טֶ֖רֶף אָדָ֥ם אָכָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he went up and down among the lions, and became a lion: and he learned to catch the prey, and to devour men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin se vaelsi jalopeurain seassa, tuli se nuoreksi jalopeuraksi, joka myös harjaantui julmasti raatelemaan ja syömään ihmisiä.
verses.king_james: And he went up and down among the lions, he became a young lion, and learned to catch the prey, and devoured men.

verses.latin_vulgate: didicit viduas facere,  et civitates earum in desertum adducere :  et desolata est terra et plenitudo ejus a voce rugitus illius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֙דַע֙ אַלְמְנוֹתָ֔יו וְעָרֵיהֶ֖ם הֶחֱרִ֑יב וַתֵּ֤שַׁם אֶ֙רֶץ֙ וּמְלֹאָ֔הּ מִקּ֖וֹל שַׁאֲגָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He learned to make widows, and to lay waste their cities: and the land became desolate, and the fulness thereof by the noise of his roaring.
verses.finnish_biblia: Se oppi heidän leskensä tuntemaan ja hävitti heidän kaupunkinsa, niin että maa ja mitä siinä oli, kauhistui hänen kiljumisensa ääntä.
verses.king_james: And he knew their desolate palaces, and he laid waste their cities; and the land was desolate, and the fulness thereof, by the noise of his roaring.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et convenerunt adversus eum gentes undique de provinciis,  et expanderunt super eum rete suum :  in vulneribus earum captus est,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְּנ֨וּ עָלָ֥יו גּוֹיִ֛ם סָבִ֖יב מִמְּדִינ֑וֹת וַֽיִּפְרְשׂ֥וּ עָלָ֛יו רִשְׁתָּ֖ם בְּשַׁחְתָּ֥ם נִתְפָּֽשׂ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the nations came together against him on every side out of the provinces, and they spread their net over him, in their wounds he was taken.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin asettivat pakanat itsensä kaikista maakunnista hänen ympärillensä, ja heittivät verkkonsa hänen päällensä, ja käsittivät hänen luolassansa.
verses.king_james: Then the nations set against him on every side from the provinces, and spread their net over him: he was taken in their pit.

verses.latin_vulgate: et miserunt eum in caveam :  in catenis adduxerunt eum ad regem Babylonis,  miseruntque eum in carcerem,  ne audiretur vox ejus ultra super montes Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּתְּנֻ֤הוּ בַסּ֙וּגַר֙ בַּחַחִ֔ים וַיְבִאֻ֖הוּ אֶל־מֶ֣לֶךְ בָּבֶ֑ל יְבִאֻ֙הוּ֙ בַּמְּצֹד֔וֹת לְמַ֗עַן לֹא־יִשָּׁמַ֥ע קוֹל֛וֹ ע֖וֹד אֶל־הָרֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And they put him into a cage, they brought him in chains to the king of Babylon: and they cast him into prison, that his voice should no more be heard upon the mountains of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja panivat hänen kahleissa vankiuteen, ja veivät hänen Babelin kuninkaan tykö; ja hän vietiin varustuksiin, ettei hänen äänensä pitänyt enää kuultaman Israelin vuorilla.
verses.king_james: And they put him in ward in chains, and brought him to the king of Babylon: they brought him into holds, that his voice should no more be heard upon the mountains of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mater tua quasi vinea in sanguine tuo super aquam plantata est :  fructus ejus et frondes ejus creverunt ex aquis multis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִמְּךָ֥ כַגֶּ֛פֶן בְּדָמְךָ֖ עַל־מַ֣יִם שְׁתוּלָ֑ה פֹּֽרִיָּה֙ וַעֲנֵפָ֔ה הָיְתָ֖ה מִמַּ֥יִם רַבִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thy mother is like a vine in thy blood planted by the water: her fruit and her branches have grown out of many waters.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun äitis on sinun levossas niinkuin viinapuu veden reunalla istutettu; ja sen hedelmät ja oksat kasvoivat siitä paljosta vedestä.
verses.king_james: Thy mother is like a vine in thy blood, planted by the waters: she was fruitful and full of branches by reason of many waters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factæ sunt ei virgæ solidæ in sceptra dominantium,  et exaltata est statura ejus inter frondes,  et vidit altitudinem suam in multitudine palmitum suorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽהְיוּ־לָ֞הּ מַטּ֣וֹת עֹ֗ז אֶל־שִׁבְטֵי֙ מֹֽשְׁלִ֔ים וַתִּגְבַּ֥הּ קוֹמָת֖וֹ עַל־בֵּ֣ין עֲבֹתִ֑ים וַיֵּרָ֣א בְגׇבְה֔וֹ בְּרֹ֖ב דָּלִיֹּתָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she hath strong rods to make sceptres for them that bear rule, and her stature was exalted among the branches: and she saw her height in the multitude of her branches.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että sen oksat niin vahvaksi tulivat, että ne herrain valtikaksi kelpasivat, ja se tuli korkiaksi paksuin oksain seassa. Ja kuin se nähtiin, että se niin korkia oli, ja että hänellä niin monta oksaa oli;
verses.king_james: And she had strong rods for the sceptres of them that bare rule, and her stature was exalted among the thick branches, and she appeared in her height with the multitude of her branches.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et evulsa est in ira, in terramque projecta,  et ventus urens siccavit fructum ejus :  marcuerunt et arefactæ sunt virgæ roboris ejus :  ignis comedit eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֻּתַּ֤שׁ בְּחֵמָה֙ לָאָ֣רֶץ הֻשְׁלָ֔כָה וְר֥וּחַ הַקָּדִ֖ים הוֹבִ֣ישׁ פִּרְיָ֑הּ הִתְפָּרְק֧וּ וְיָבֵ֛שׁוּ מַטֵּ֥ה עֻזָּ֖הּ אֵ֥שׁ אֲכָלָֽתְהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But she was plucked up in wrath, and cast on the ground, and the burning wind dried up her fruit: her strong rods are withered, and dried up: the fire hath devoured her.
verses.finnish_biblia: Reväistiin se maahan vihassa, ja heitettiin pois, itätuuli kuivasi hänen hedelmänsä; ja sen vahvat oksat murrettiin rikki, niin että ne kuivetuksi ja tulelta poltetuiksi tulivat.
verses.king_james: But she was plucked up in fury, she was cast down to the ground, and the east wind dried up her fruit: her strong rods were broken and withered; the fire consumed them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc transplantata est in desertum,  in terra invia et sitienti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֖ה שְׁתוּלָ֣ה בַמִּדְבָּ֑ר בְּאֶ֖רֶץ צִיָּ֥ה וְצָמָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And now she is transplanted into the desert, in a land not passable, and dry.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta nyt se on istutettu korpeen, kuivaan ja karkiaan maahan.
verses.king_james: And now she is planted in the wilderness, in a dry and thirsty ground.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et egressus est ignis de virga ramorum ejus,  qui fructum ejus comedit :  et non fuit in ea virga fortis,  sceptrum dominantium. Planctus est, et erit in planctum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֵּצֵ֨א אֵ֜שׁ מִמַּטֵּ֤ה בַדֶּ֙יהָ֙ פִּרְיָ֣הּ אָכָ֔לָה וְלֹא־הָ֥יָה בָ֛הּ מַטֵּה־עֹ֖ז שֵׁ֣בֶט לִמְשׁ֑וֹל קִ֥ינָה הִ֖יא וַתְּהִ֥י לְקִינָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And a fire is gone out from a rod of her branches, which hath devoured her fruit: so that she now hath no strong rod, to be a sceptre of rulers. This is a lamentation, and it shall be for a lamentation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tuli kävi ulos sen vahvoista oksista, se söi sen hedelmän, niin ettei sen päällä enään vahvoja oksia ole herrain valtikaksi. Se on valitettava ja surullinen asia.
verses.king_james: And fire is gone out of a rod of her branches, which hath devoured her fruit, so that she hath no strong rod to be a sceptre to rule. This is a lamentation, and shall be for a lamentation.
